arguments.name: There is not input for this command.

description: This command allows you to retrieve the stored client offset for the feed API.
examples:
Command Example
#
!cyren-threat-indepth-get-client-offset
Human Readable Output
#
Cyren Threat InDepth ip_reputation feed client offset is 500 (API provided max offset of 1000).
Additional Information
#

!cyren-threat-indepth-get-client-offset

Additional Information

Contact us:
support@cyren.com

outputs.name: There is no context output for this command.

source_title: Cyren Threat InDepth Threat Intelligence Feed
